name: Mojito jug
title: Mojito Group Serve Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Mojito for the Group | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A refreshing group-size mojito made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, lime, mint, simple syrup, and soda water.
marketing_description: Real mojitos are made with BACARDÍ. Press some mint and lime, then pour in BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum and club soda for a refreshing Cuban classic.

steps: Combine the first three ingredients together in a punch bowl with torn mint leaves.
Pour mix over crushed ice in individual highball glasses.
Garnish with a mint sprig and a lime wedge.

garnish: mint sprig and a lime wedge
raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Mojito jug 300 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum 150 ml lime juice 112.5 ml simple syrup mint leaves top with soda water Punch Bowl ... Step 1 Combine the first three ingredients together in a punch bowl with torn mint leaves. Step 2 Pour mix over crushed ice in individual highball glasses. Step 3 Fizz Top each with club soda. Step 4 Garnish with a mint sprig and a lime wedge.
